one_time_description: Canada Mortgage and Housing Corporation new construction funding received in Other segment
economic_notes: Spuzzum First Nation holds 17.9% interest in Nlaka'pamux Resources Limited Partnership, a commercial economic development entity. Also holds investment units in BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 statements were signed June 17, 2021, over a year late. Long-term debt includes both Note 7 long-term debt ($635,911) and Note 8 term loans due on demand ($1,139,761), totalling $1,775,672. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $1,343,273 + Province of BC $78,616 + CMHC $24,529 + FNHA $19,446 + CMHC new construction $229,896 + Sto:lo Aboriginal Skills & Training $19,080 + FNESC $27,267 + Fraser Thompson Indian Services Society $155,921 = $1,898,028 less non-government portions; OSR includes BC FN Gaming Revenue Sharing LP $326,578, other revenue $169,548, rental income $41,975, earnings from partnerships $51,413, property tax $23,281. CMHC new construction $229,896 appears as one-time item in Other schedule. No schedule of remuneration provided. Annual debt service calculated as LTD repayment $13,037 + term loan repayment $10,333 = $23,370. Funds held in trust $786,220 included in financial assets. COVID-19 noted as having no significant impact on 2020 operations.
